# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-NOD-001](task-0154): Node Descriptor and Heartbeat

## Purpose

Implement node descriptor and heartbeat.

## Scope

- Descriptor format
- Heartbeat logic
- Status reporting

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Implement heartbeat
3. Add status reporting

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Heartbeat works
3. Status reported
